pr_text:
## Title: Replace magic numbers with symbolic constants in E1AP bearer context management

### Summary
Replace hardcoded numeric literals with symbolic constants to improve code readability and maintainability in the E1AP bearer context management module. The magic number `1` was used in multiple locations to represent two distinct constraints: the maximum number of DRBs per PDU session and the maximum RAN count. These constraints are now explicitly defined as `E1AP_MAX_DRB_PER_PDU_SESSION` and
